products.name: Free Checklist Preview
products.customer_situation: You want a simple checklist before you buy.
products.outcome: See what to gather before you apply.

products.name: Letter of Explanation
products.customer_situation: You need to explain a gap, issue, or special situation in plain words before you apply.
products.outcome: Prepare a truthful letter that explains what happened and what you are doing next.
products.description: Prepare a clear, truthful letter that explains your situation before you apply. Use it for credit history, income gaps, job changes, address history, rental issues, late payments, bank statement questions, or other application questions. You fill it in yourself. ApprovalPrep does not contact anyone for you, repair credit, give legal advice, create fake documents, or promise approval.

products.name: Income + Employment Letter Kit
products.customer_situation: You need to explain work, income, job changes, or employment gaps.
products.outcome: Prepare self-service letters that explain your work and income clearly.
products.description: Prepare self-service letters that explain your work and income clearly. This kit includes templates and guides for employment verification, proof of income, self-employment income, job changes, employment gaps, and bank statement explanations. You fill in the letters yourself and attach real documents if needed. ApprovalPrep does not contact employers, verify employment for you, create fake income papers, give financial advice, or promise approval.
products.risk_note: Use real work and income facts only.

products.name: Credit Letter Kit
products.customer_situation: You want to prepare your own credit letters and follow-up steps.
products.outcome: Prepare clear self-service letters for possible credit report errors and related credit questions.
products.description: Prepare your own self-service credit letters and checklists. This kit helps you write clear letters for possible credit report errors, late payments, goodwill requests, debt validation, and follow-up steps. You write and send the letters yourself. ApprovalPrep does not repair credit for you, contact credit bureaus for you, remove accurate items, contact creditors, give legal advice, or promise any result.
products.risk_note: This is self-service only. You send your own letters.

products.name: Rental Application Kit
products.customer_situation: You want your rental papers organized before you apply.
products.outcome: Build a clearer rental packet with letters, checklists, and document prep steps.
products.description: Get your rental application papers organized before you apply. This self-service kit includes checklists, letter guidance, and document prep support to help you explain your situation clearly and keep your packet complete. Use it for apartment applications, rental history questions, income questions, employment details, landlord follow-up, and supporting document prep. You prepare and send your own materials. ApprovalPrep does not contact landlords, repair credit, create fake documents, act as your agent, or promise approval.
products.risk_note: You prepare and send your own materials.

products.name: Loan Prep Letter Kit
products.customer_situation: You need to explain documents before a loan or financing review.
products.outcome: Prepare letters and checklists for loan, auto, mortgage, or financing questions.
products.description: Prepare letters and checklists before a loan or financing review. This self-service kit helps you explain credit history, income, job changes, bank statement questions, and other application details in a clear way. Use it for auto loans, personal loans, mortgage prep, or other financing situations where you need to explain your documents. ApprovalPrep is not a lender, broker, credit repair company, law firm, or financial advisor. We do not contact lenders for you or promise approval.

products.name: Business Funding Prep Kit

This kit helps you organize business documents, explain income, explain bank activity, describe use of funds, and prepare follow-up letters. Use it for business loan prep, SBA prep, lender questions, or business document readiness. ApprovalPrep is not a lender, broker, law firm, accountant, or financial advisor. Use it when you need a clear letter or checklist before sending documents to a school, employer, landlord, agency, company, or other office.
